mapper.select: select name from tblAddress where seq = #{_parameter}
select count(*) from tblUser where id = #{_parameter}
select a.* from (select * from tblAddress order by seq desc) a where rownum <=5
mapper.insert: insert into tblAddress (seq, name, age, gender, address) values (seqAddress.nextval, #{name}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{address})
mapper.select: select * from (select a.*, rownum as rnum from (select * from tblAddress order by seq desc) a) where rnum between #{begin} and ${end}
